identity.title: Rum Pon Gold
identity.styleSentence: A high-energy Brooklyn-meets-Kingston dancehall banger running at 172 BPM featuring dirty analog drums with a punchy boom-bap kick layer, deep rolling sub bass, skanking guitar chops, sharp piano stabs, organ bubbles, brass hits, record scratches, and vinyl warmth that creates an intimate yet sweaty nightclub atmosphere.
identity.vocalStyle: male ragga deejay trading call-and-response chants with a sexy female dancehall vocalist

lyrics.text:
[DJ Intro]
Yo
Gold cup crew
Smoke room massive
Brooklyn to Kingston
Run it

[Beat In]

[Male DJ]
Rum pon gold

[Female]
Wine pon me

[Male DJ]
Smoke inna air

[Female]
Come find me

[Male DJ]
Rum pon gold

[Female]
Move that waist

[Male DJ]
Pull up the riddim

[Female]
Don’t waste taste

[Drop]

[Hook - Call and Response]
Rum pon gold

Gold inna cup

Smoke don’t fold

Turn it up

Body too bold

Wine it slow

Night getting hot

Don’t let go

[Female]
Wine pon me
Wine pon me
If you bad, come prove it

[Male DJ]
Easy now
Easy now
Don’t stop, girl, move it

[Post-Hook]
Left side
Bubble

Right side
Trouble

Front row
Sweating

Back row
Double

[Verse - Male DJ]
Red cup tilt when the bassline knock
Gold chain swing when the waistline drop
Room full smoke, and the door stay locked
DJ pull it back when the whole place rock

Brooklyn hot

[Female]
Kingston hotter

[Male DJ]
Who bring fire?

[Female]
We bring proper

[Male DJ]
Who got rum?

[Female]
Pour more water

[Male DJ]
Who bad bad?

[Female]
Don’t ask, father

[Hook]
Rum pon gold

Gold inna cup

Smoke don’t fold

Turn it up

Body too bold

Wine it slow

Night getting hot

Don’t let go

[Breakdown]
One time

[Female]
Wine pon me

[Male DJ]
Two time

[Female]
Wine pon me

[Male DJ]
Three time

[Female]
Don’t watch me

[Male DJ]
Four time

[Both]
Pull up, pull up

[Instrumental Riddim Break]
Hey
Hey
Hey
Forward

[Female Lead]
Don’t spill the drink
Light another one
DJ nah done
Morning never come

Hands on my waist
But don’t move dumb
If you can’t keep time
Then you can’t get none

[Male DJ]
Talk to dem

[Female]
I like it rough
But smooth with the timing
Gold on the skin
Bassline climbing

Smoke in my hair
Rum in the lighting
If I say pull up
You better rewind it

[Hook]
Rum pon gold

Gold inna cup

Smoke don’t fold

Turn it up

Body too bold

Wine it slow

Night getting hot

Don’t let go

[Final Chant]
Rum pon gold
Rum pon gold

Wine pon me
Wine pon me

Smoke inna air
Smoke inna air

Pull up again
Pull up again

[Outro - DJ Friendly]
Gold cup
Smoke room

Bassline
Boom boom

Brooklyn
Kingston

Run it
Run it

analysis.summary: A sweaty, raw dancehall anthem celebrating a confident 'crew' in a smoky Brooklyn-to-Kingston club where drinking rum and flashing gold chains fuel an intense, non-stop party vibe.

keywords.imageryPrompt: Shimmering liquid gold swirling in a crystal cup, reflecting neon club lights on wet skin.
Thick blue-grey cigarette smoke curling through the air of a dimly lit basement room with hanging light fixtures.
Deep amber liquid sloshing in tilted red plastic cups, condensation dripping onto wooden tables.
A tight-knit group of dancers moving in perfect sync within a crowded dance floor filled with sweat and energy.
Silhouette of hips swaying rhythmically against a backdrop of deep purple shadows and strobe light flares.
Heat waves distorting the view in a packed nightclub, glowing skin tones under intense overhead lighting.
